name: Westside Bunker
address: 6488 Glenway Ave Suite N, Cincinnati, OH 45211
about: Westside Bunker is an indoor golf simulator venue in Cincinnati, OH, offering a full golf experience regardless of weather conditions. The facility features state-of-the-art simulators with advanced tracking technology, allowing players to practice, play, or host events in a relaxed setting. While pricing details are limited to membership options, the venue emphasizes flexibility and convenience for various golfing activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade ProTee VX launch monitors with instant shot feedback
GSPro simulator software for ultra-realistic course recreation
Flexible options for solo practice, groups, and private events
BYO food and drinks allowed for a personalized experience
SGT Tours & Stats for scorecard tracking and league participation

food_and_drink.notes: BYO food is permitted; venue encourages bringing snacks

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional accuracy and instant shot feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typically recommended for best performance.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYO food and drinks are permitted and encouraged.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typical simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on pace.

faq.question: Is Westside Bunker kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior lessons and accommodates families.
